lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਰੇ ਸੇਈ ਆਗੈ ਆਖੀਅਹਿ ਦਰਗਹ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਸਾਚੀ ਮਾਣੋ ॥
lines.translit: soore seee aagai aakheeeh daragah paaveh saachee maano |
lines.english: They alone are acclaimed as brave warriors in the world hereafter, who receive true honor in the Court of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਰਗਹ ਮਾਣੁ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਪਤਿ ਸਿਉ ਜਾਵਹਿ ਆਗੈ ਦੂਖੁ ਨ ਲਾਗੈ ॥
lines.translit: daragah maan paaveh pat siau jaaveh aagai dookh na laagai |
lines.english: They are honored in the Court of the Lord; they depart with honor, and they do not suffer pain in the world hereafter.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਏਕੁ ਧਿਆਵਹਿ ਤਾਂ ਫਲੁ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਜਿਤੁ ਸੇਵਿਐ ਭਉ ਭਾਗੈ ॥
lines.translit: kar ek dhiaaveh taan fal paaveh jit seviai bhau bhaagai |
lines.english: They meditate on the One Lord, and obtain the fruits of their rewards. Serving the Lord, their fear is dispelled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਊਚਾ ਨਹੀ ਕਹਣਾ ਮਨ ਮਹਿ ਰਹਣਾ ਆਪੇ ਜਾਣੈ ਜਾਣੋ ॥
lines.translit: aoochaa nahee kahanaa man meh rahanaa aape jaanai jaano |
lines.english: Do not indulge in egotism, and dwell within your own mind; the Knower Himself knows everything.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਰਣੁ ਮੁਣਸਾਂ ਸੂਰਿਆ ਹਕੁ ਹੈ ਜੋ ਹੋਇ ਮਰਹਿ ਪਰਵਾਣੋ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: maran munasaan sooriaa hak hai jo hoe mareh paravaano |3|
lines.english: The death of brave heroes is blessed, if it is approved by God. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੀਤਾ ਵੇਖੈ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਆਪਣਾ ਕੁਦਰਤਿ ਕਰੇ ਬੀਚਾਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: keetaa vekhai saahib aapanaa kudarat kare beechaaro |
lines.english: The Lord Master beholds His work, and contemplates His creative potency.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕਿਸ ਨੋ ਬਾਬਾ ਰੋਈਐ ਬਾਜੀ ਹੈ ਇਹੁ ਸੰਸਾਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: naanak kis no baabaa roeeai baajee hai ihu sansaaro |
lines.english: Nanak: for whom should we mourn, O Baba? This world is merely a play.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਕਿਛੁ ਕੀਆ ਸੋਈ ਜਾਣੈ ਤਾ ਕਾ ਰੂਪੁ ਅਪਾਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: jin kichh keea soee jaanai taa kaa roop apaaro |
lines.english: He who created these things, He alone knows. His subtle form is infinite.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਵੇਖੈ ਆਪੇ ਬੂਝੈ ਆਪੇ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਪਛਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: aape vekhai aape boojhai aape hukam pachhaanai |
lines.english: He Himself beholds it, and He Himself understands it. He Himself realizes the Hukam of His Command.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੁਦਰਤਿ ਬੀਚਾਰੇ ਧਾਰਣ ਧਾਰੇ ਜਿਨਿ ਕੀਆ ਸੋ ਜਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: kudarat beechaare dhaaran dhaare jin keea so jaanai |
lines.english: He contemplates His creative potency, having established the Universe. He who created it, He alone knows.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕਿਸ ਨੋ ਬਾਬਾ ਰੋਈਐ ਬਾਜੀ ਹੈ ਇਹੁ ਸੰਸਾਰੋ ॥੪॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak kis no baabaa roeeai baajee hai ihu sansaaro |4|2|
lines.english: Nanak: for whom should we mourn, O Baba? This world is merely a play. ||4||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਸਿਰੰਦਾ ਸਚਾ ਜਾਣੀਐ ਸਚੜਾ ਪਰਵਦਗਾਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: sach sirandaa sachaa jaaneeai sacharraa paravadagaaro |
lines.english: The True Creator Lord is True - know this well; He is the True Sustainer.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡਹੰਸੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ਦਖਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: vaddahans mahalaa 1 dakhanee |
lines.english: Wadahans, First Mehl, Dakhanee:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਆਪੀਨੈ ਆਪੁ ਸਾਜਿਆ ਸਚੜਾ ਅਲਖ ਅਪਾਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: jin aapeenai aap saajiaa sacharraa alakh apaaro |
lines.english: He Himself fashioned His Own Self; the True Lord is invisible and infinite.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਇ ਪੁੜ ਜੋੜਿ ਵਿਛੋੜਿਅਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਬਿਨੁ ਘੋਰੁ ਅੰਧਾਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: due purr jorr vichhorrian gur bin ghor andhaaro |
lines.english: He brought together, and then separated, the two grinding stones of the earth and the sky; without the Guru, there is only pitch darkness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਰਜੁ ਚੰਦੁ ਸਿਰਜਿਅਨੁ ਅਹਿਨਿਸਿ ਚਲਤੁ ਵੀਚਾਰੋ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sooraj chand sirajian ahinis chalat veechaaro |1|
lines.english: He created the sun and the moon; night and day, they move according to His Thought. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੜਾ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਸਚੁ ਤੂ ਸਚੜਾ ਦੇਹਿ ਪਿਆਰੋ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sacharraa saahib sach too sacharraa dehi piaaro | rahaau |
lines.english: O True Lord and Master, You are True. O True Lord, bless me with Your Love. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਧੁ ਸਿਰਜੀ ਮੇਦਨੀ ਦੁਖੁ ਸੁਖੁ ਦੇਵਣਹਾਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: tudh sirajee medanee dukh sukh devanahaaro |
lines.english: You created the Universe; You are the Giver of pain and pleasure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਰੀ ਪੁਰਖ ਸਿਰਜਿਐ ਬਿਖੁ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹੁ ਪਿਆਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: naaree purakh sirajiai bikh maaeaa mohu piaaro |
lines.english: You created woman and man, the love of poison, and emotional attachment to Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਾਣੀ ਬਾਣੀ ਤੇਰੀਆ ਦੇਹਿ ਜੀਆ ਆਧਾਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: khaanee baanee tereea dehi jeea aadhaaro |
lines.english: The four sources of creation, and the power of the Word, are also of Your making. You give Support to all beings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੁਦਰਤਿ ਤਖਤੁ ਰਚਾਇਆ ਸਚਿ ਨਿਬੇੜਣਹਾਰੋ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: kudarat takhat rachaaeaa sach niberranahaaro |2|
lines.english: You have made the Creation as Your Throne; You are the True Judge. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਾ ਗਵਣੁ ਸਿਰਜਿਆ ਤੂ ਥਿਰੁ ਕਰਣੈਹਾਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: aavaa gavan sirajiaa too thir karanaihaaro |
lines.english: You created comings and goings, but You are ever-stable, O Creator Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੰਮਣੁ ਮਰਣਾ ਆਇ ਗਇਆ ਬਧਿਕੁ ਜੀਉ ਬਿਕਾਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: jaman maranaa aae geaa badhik jeeo bikaaro |
lines.english: In birth and death, in coming and going, this soul is held in bondage by corruption.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੂਡੜੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਿਸਾਰਿਆ ਬੂਡੜੈ ਕਿਆ ਤਿਸੁ ਚਾਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: bhooddarrai naam visaariaa booddarrai kiaa tis chaaro |
lines.english: The evil person has forgotten the Naam; he has drowned - what can he do now?

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦੜੇ ਆਏ ਤਿਨਾ ਜਾਨੀਆ ਹੁਕਮਿ ਸਚੇ ਕਰਤਾਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: sadarre aae tinaa jaaneea hukam sache karataaro |
lines.english: The beloved soul has received the Call, the Command of the True Creator Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਛੋਡਿ ਬਿਖੁ ਲਦਿਆ ਅਵਗੁਣ ਕਾ ਵਣਜਾਰੋ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: gun chhodd bikh ladiaa avagun kaa vanajaaro |3|
lines.english: Forsaking merit, he has loaded the poisonous cargo of demerits; he is a trader of sins. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੂਪੁ ਨ ਜਾਣੈ ਸੋਹਣੀਐ ਹੁਕਮਿ ਬਧੀ ਸਿਰਿ ਕਾਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: roop na jaanai sohaneeai hukam badhee sir kaaro |
lines.english: No one cares for your beauty, O beautiful bride.; the Messenger of Death is bound only by the Lord Commander's Command.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਰੀ ਪੁਰਖ ਵਿਛੁੰਨਿਆ ਵਿਛੁੜਿਆ ਮੇਲਣਹਾਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: naaree purakh vichhuniaa vichhurriaa melanahaaro |
lines.english: The soul, the husband, has become separated from the body, the bride. The Lord is the Re-uniter of the separated ones.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਲਕ ਬਿਰਧਿ ਨ ਜਾਣਨੀ ਤੋੜਨਿ ਹੇਤੁ ਪਿਆਰੋ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: baalak biradh na jaananee torran het piaaro |4|
lines.english: He does not distinguish between young children and old people; he tears apart love and affection. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਉ ਦਰ ਠਾਕੇ ਹੁਕਮਿ ਸਚੈ ਹੰਸੁ ਗਇਆ ਗੈਣਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: nau dar tthaake hukam sachai hans geaa gainaare |
lines.english: The nine doors are closed by the True Lord's Command, and the swan-soul takes flight into the skies.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾ ਧਨ ਛੁਟੀ ਮੁਠੀ ਝੂਠਿ ਵਿਧਣੀਆ ਮਿਰਤਕੜਾ ਅੰਙਨੜੇ ਬਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: saa dhan chhuttee mutthee jhootth vidhaneea miratakarraa anganarre baare |
lines.english: The body-bride is separated, and defrauded by falsehood; she is now a widow - her husband's body lies dead in the courtyard.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਰਤਿ ਮੁਈ ਮਰੁ ਮਾਈਏ ਮਹਲ ਰੁੰਨੀ ਦਰ ਬਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: surat muee mar maaeee mehal runee dar baare |
lines.english: The widow cries out at the door, "The light of my mind has gone out, O my mother, with his death."

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੋਵਹੁ ਕੰਤ ਮਹੇਲੀਹੋ ਸਚੇ ਕੇ ਗੁਣ ਸਾਰੇ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: rovahu kant maheleeho sache ke gun saare |5|
lines.english: So cry out, O soul-brides of the Husband Lord, and dwell on the Glorious Praises of the True Lord. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਲਿ ਮਲਿ ਜਾਨੀ ਨਾਵਾਲਿਆ ਕਪੜਿ ਪਟਿ ਅੰਬਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: jal mal jaanee naavaaliaa kaparr patt anbaare |
lines.english: Her loved one is cleansed, bathed in water, and dressed in silken robes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਨੀ ਵਿਛੁੰਨੜੇ ਮੇਰਾ ਮਰਣੁ ਭਇਆ ਧ੍ਰਿਗੁ ਜੀਵਣੁ ਸੰਸਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: jaanee vichhunarre meraa maran bheaa dhrig jeevan sansaare |
lines.english: "Separation from my beloved is like death to me!" cries the widow. "My life in this world is cursed and worthless!"

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਾਜੇ ਵਜੇ ਸਚੀ ਬਾਣੀਆ ਪੰਚ ਮੁਏ ਮਨੁ ਮਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: vaaje vaje sachee baaneea panch mue man maare |
lines.english: The musicians play, and the Bani of the True Lord's Words are sung; the five relatives feel as if they too are dead, so deadened are their minds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਸੀ ਰੋਵਹੁ ਰੋਵਣ ਆਈਹੋ ਝੂਠਿ ਮੁਠੀ ਸੰਸਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: tusee rovahu rovan aaeeho jhootth mutthee sansaare |
lines.english: So cry out in mourning, you who have come to mourn; this world is false and fraudulent.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਵਤੁ ਮਰੈ ਸੁ ਜਾਣੀਐ ਪਿਰ ਸਚੜੈ ਹੇਤਿ ਪਿਆਰੇ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: jeevat marai su jaaneeai pir sacharrai het piaare |6|
lines.english: But she alone is approved, who dies, while yet still alive; she lives for the sake of the Love of her Beloved. ||6||
